text: HARTING Product Change Notification NOR 0603/03 PCN Business Unit: Electric PCN/22/013/C+N Product range: Han / Han-Modular Date: 2022-06-14 Author: Heinz-Guenter Spreen Title: Han(R) Megabit module 1 cable entry - External Details of Product Changes 1. Concerned part number (see also attachment): 09140083021 09142083021 09140083121 09142083121 09140083022 09142083022 09140083122 09142083122 2. Description of changes / news: The Han® Megabit module cable entry inner width will be enlarged from 9 mm to 10 mm width. Current Megabit module with cover New Megabit module with cover Additionally the sharp edges of the inner contour will be smoothened a little to improve the handling. 3. Impact on product specification: The modification has no impact on specifications, handling and applications. 4. Scheduled date of implementation: January 2023 5. Identification of change: New revision level
